description_long: This is a solid-body electric guitar with a single cutaway design, reminiscent of the classic Les Paul shape. The body features a striking, colorful abstract graphic on the front, blending shades of yellow, pink, blue, and purple over a black base. The back and sides of the guitar are finished in a glossy black, with a visible electronics cavity cover on the rear. The neck is straight and dark, likely made of wood, with a rosewood or ebony fingerboard and metallic frets. The headstock is angled and fitted with six tuning pegs in a 3+3 arrangement, and a circular logo is visible on the front of the body near the neck joint. Chrome hardware, including bridge and control knobs, is present, and the guitar is equipped with two humbucker pickups and a three-way selector switch.
description: A solid-body electric guitar with a vibrant, multicolored graphic on a black base, chrome hardware, and a classic single cutaway shape.
description_view_0: Front view showing the colorful abstract graphic, chrome hardware, pickups, and control knobs.
description_view_1: Side profile highlighting the guitar's slim body depth and the angled headstock.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the glossy black finish and the electronics cavity cover.
description_view_3: Opposite side profile showing the body thickness and the edge of the control knobs.
attribute_headstock_design: Angled headstock with 3+3 tuning peg arrangement, no visible logo, standard Les Paul-style contour
